recipe.title: HORSERADISH SOUP

ingredient_lines.raw_text: 1 large leek, trimmed, roughly chopped and washed

steps.instruction: 1.5 litres hot vegetable stock salt and freshly ground black pepper lOOg freshly grated horseradish, or more to taste 1- 2 tbsp double cream Melt the butter in a large saucepan. Add the onion and leek, cover and cook gently without colouring for 3- 4 minutes, stirring every so often, to soften Stir in the flour and cook over a low heat for 30 seconds.
then gradually stir in the vegetable stock. Bnng to the boil, season and simmer for 30 minutes.
Add about two-thirds of the horseradish to the soup and simmer for 5 minutes, then take off the heat.
Puree in a blender until smooth, then pass through a fine-meshed sieve into a clean saucepan.
Taste for seasoning and the horseradish, adding more to taste. You don't need to blend the soup again the extra horseradish gives a nice te lure. Add the cream, bring back to a simmer and serve.
